task_snapshots.title: 334d-03: Live Logs & File Lock Visualization
task_snapshots.description: Implement live per-agent log streaming panel and file lock map display. Build WebSocket/SSE streaming for agent logs, auto-scroll behavior, and file lock visualization showing owned_files per agent with edit state. Target: src/bernstein/dashboard/templates/index.html (logs-tab, locks-tab sections) and src/bernstein/core/routes/dashboard.py (file_locks endpoint). Completion: logs stream in real-time, file locks display correctly with agent ownership. [subtask of 5c08ace74a2c]
